prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your technology digital forward
items: Conduct a comprehensive audit of your current digital tools and subscriptions
Create a personal digital security baseline by enabling two-factor authentication on your 5 most important accounts
Research and document 3 technology learning resources that match your current skill level and learning style
Set up a unified digital file organization system across all your devices and cloud storage
Identify and document your top 3 technology pain points and research one potential solution for each
Create a comprehensive backup strategy for your digital data and test one backup method
